role_id.description: The role id to use for this role.
role_id.rationale: Identifier only and does not grant permissions by itself

org_id.description: The numeric ID of the organization in which you want to create a custom role.
org_id.rationale: Identifier only and does not affect access by itself

title.description: A human-readable title for the role.
title.rationale: Label only and has no direct security effect

description.description: A human-readable description for the role.
description.rationale: Documentation only and has no direct security effect

permissions.description: The names of the permissions this role grants when bound in an IAM policy. At least one permission must be specified.
permissions.rationale: Defines proper capabilities. Privilege escalation may result from risky or administrator-level permissions.

stage.description: Defaults to `GA`. List of possible stages is [here](https://cloud.google.com/iam/reference/rest/v1/organizations.roles#Role.RoleLaunchStage).
stage.rationale: Unstable stages like ALPHA or BETA may cause unexpected behavior. Stable GA or DISABLED are safer
